title: doronicum × grafii
intro: Doronicum × grafii is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between the European leopard's bane (Doronicum pardalianches) and the white leopards bane (Doronicum plantagineum). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Doronicum × grafii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and soothe respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment for medicinal purposes, with the leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts for herbal preparations.
